value.original: This module was created for ticket 15856, which requests control of the withholdings that are eliminated by saving their information in a tab in the supplier invoice window.

row.value: This module was created for ticket 15856, which requests control of the withholdings that are eliminated by saving their information in a tab in the supplier invoice window.

value.original:
